name: ai-mobile
description: A Director-CFO orchestrator that turns complex projects into context-backed plans, resource budgets, typed worker teams, finite campaigns, and verified outcomes.

interface.shortDescription: Direct complex AI projects through plans, budgets, teams, and evidence.
interface.longDescription: AI Mobile is a Director-CFO orchestration runtime shared by Codex and Claude Code. It bypasses tasks that can be completed directly within one minute. For complex work, the visible Codex task remains a lightweight zero-file console while separate workers build authorized project context, create a strong master plan, forecast total demand, allocate available models and permissions, execute typed work packages in finite campaigns, reconcile failures, and report only verified material progress. Durable revision fences, protected reserves, isolated patch integration, and acceptance evidence prevent stale work, wasteful retries, and false completion.
capabilities: Strong master plans with milestones and risks
Plan-wide demand forecasting and resource budgets
Typed worker teams and permission preflight
Separate Codex CLI, Claude, Antigravity, and Cursor work plane
Fresh model and quota-pool capacity evidence
Bounded deterministic dispatch, collect, integrate, and advance cycle
Trusted Fable 5 and Sonnet 5 primary writers
Shared Codex and Claude Code installation
Exact OpenAI.Codex package and task restart
Path-bounded Codex diff transport without sandbox bypass
defaultPrompt: Use AI Mobile as the Director-CFO to finish this project through authorized context, a master plan, a resource budget, typed worker teams, finite campaigns, and verified evidence
Use AI Mobile for this complex project; keep the visible task as the lightweight console and make workers perform the project work
Use AI Mobile to reconcile this existing Director-CFO program and continue from its latest verified state
Show the passive AI Mobile resource inventory
